Change in tint?
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2019 at 7:42 AM Rating: Good
stickleback
Guru
153 posts
Looks green on my Warrior or Bard, added a couple of screenshots (graphic looks quite good I think)

Berserkers
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2004 at 2:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764265050
4 posts
This item is also useable by berserkers.
▲ Page top
New Drop Mob ?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2003 at 10:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768819059
1 post

I'm not sure if the drop has changed on this, but found one on a Frenzied Ghoul 10-16-03. I was exploring the Assassin's area and sat down to heal when he wandered up on me. He was at about 75% health..I'm guessing someone tried to kill him and ran him thru the dungeon. His spawn point is not near the Assassin area at all !

Anyway..he hit like a ton of bricks..I was doing the exploring with my 65th Warrior and he got in some good licks 130+. He did NOT have the FBSS, so I'm thinking SoE may have changed his alt drop to Exc. Hood...?

Just wanted to share the info...Novice
▲ Page top
Dex over Wis
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2003 at 9:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785852120
28 posts
In my opinion you should definitely take this item over ivy etched.. as rangers we rely on Dex way more than wisdom to do our job (dealing damage) and if your trying to raise bow skill, i know how much of a pain in the **** it can be and you'll need all the dex you can get
▲ Page top
Help
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2003 at 7:35 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781277551
View User Forum
5 posts
Okay, need advice...
I am a Human Ranger on FV level 32.
I was looking into this as a potential upgrade to my Ivy Etched Helm.
I don't really like the fact of the lesser AC and the subsequent loss of my WIS,...but I like and sorta need the DEX for me bow and weapon procs.

Gulian
32 Ranger
Firiona Vie
▲ Page top
Hail to the Hood
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2002 at 3:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757755117
View User Forum
47 posts
This is still one of the best head items for a Monk / Beastlord until you can get level 50+ no drop stuff.

The leather graphic doesn't look that cool but I'm not parting with the stats on this thing. It helps my weapon proc immensely.
▲ Page top
RE: Hail to the Hood
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2002 at 8:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774811993
8 posts
As a 45 Beastlord I prefer my Shissar Scaled Headband over this(i like the fact that it has no grafic because vah shir don't look good with head gear). I am not twinked and got my cash the hard way since this is my main char, to all those thinking it.

View User Forum

i have a helm of rile atm and it is sweet, but thing is it weighs 4 and is weighing me monky down. should i where this or the helm. stast on helm is much better. exe hood weighs less tho.

Which one
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 8:50 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761515433
14 posts
Which one is better for monk...executioners hood or crown of frog kings?>
▲ Page top
RE: Which one
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2002 at 11:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253014569
19 posts
Depends on the situation. Normal solo and groups id go with the executioners hood. If it were a dragon raid or some such thing i go with the froggy crown casue of saves. Just my opinion.

# Dec 25 2001 at 6:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772385951

▲ Page top
graphic = gay
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2001 at 12:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760381676
20 posts
The graphic on this think makes it look like your wearing a paper bag on your head. At least it does for dwarfs and DEs.
▲ Page top
RE: graphic = gay
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2001 at 7:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Looks better on other races. Looks like a polar bear head on barbarians and a sarnak skull on iksar. Same graphic as any other leather type hat (such as leather skullcap, lumberjack's cap, etc.)

Update: As of Luclin this is no longer true about barbarians; they've changed the leather hat graphics on them. So you won't get the bear head or cat head graphics on barbarians anymore unless you have the Luclin graphics turned off for them.

Edited, Thu Oct 17 01:31:11 2002
▲ Page top
monk
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2001 at 4:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762840657
23 posts
great for a monk...got the stats they want
▲ Page top
RE: monk
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2001 at 7:26 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
/agree. I bought this today to replace my Lumberjack's Cap. Although this has 5 less ac than the LJ cap and no stamina, this weighs 1.3 stones less, and the 4str and 9dex are worth more than a mere 6hp, which is all 3sta gives you. Definitely one of the better head items for a monk.
▲ Page top
WTF?
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2001 at 11:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760700540
67 posts
Uh... Shaman isn't listed here.. But I remember equipping it once, my friend said she heard it looked good on barb males, but showed the stupid polar bear hat.. So.. Has it been changed since that pic, or what?
▲ Page top
RE: WTF?
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2001 at 7:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Could be she's confusing it with another item. Shamans can wear the Lumberjack's cap, and that displays the same graphic as this does when worn. But shamans can't wear this one.

And yes, this does look like a polar bear head on barbarians too, just like any other leather cap does.

Update: New Luclin graphics for barbarians doesn't make this look like a bear head anymore. Tis only looks like a bear head on barbarians if you have the Luclin graphics turned off for them.

Edited, Thu Oct 17 01:33:42 2002
▲ Page top
